title: Understanding the Problem
text: To find the force necessary to produce a given acceleration, we can use Newton's second law of motion.

title: Newton's Second Law
text: Newton's second law states that force is equal to mass times acceleration. The formula is $$F=m a$$.

title: Calculate the Force
text: Given the mass $$m=2.1\times{10}^3$$ kg and acceleration $$a=196$$ $$\frac{m}{s^2}$$, calculate the force using the formula $$F=m a$$.
